list.name: mac
list.query:
from(bucket: "aircare")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor" and r._field == "co2_fc")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["mac", "label"])
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value: r.mac, text: if exists r.label and r.label != "" then r.label else r.mac }))
  |> unique(column: "_value")

targets.query:
from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2_fc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.mac == "${mac}" or "${mac}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2_fc" or r._field == "co2_uc" or r._field == "co2_fu" or r._field == "co2_uu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.mac == "${mac}" or "${mac}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.mac == "${mac}" or "${mac}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.mac == "${mac}" or "${mac}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.mac == "${mac}" or "${mac}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rl1" or r._field == "rl2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.mac == "${mac}" or "${mac}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.mac == "${mac}" or "${mac}" == "$__all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "mac", "event", "param"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 100)
